package models

// Anti-pattern: GORM model contains a calculated JSON response field (full_name)
// that combines first_name and last_name. This presentation concern does not
// belong in a persistence struct.

type User struct {
	ID        uint   `gorm:"primaryKey" json:"id"`
	FirstName string `gorm:"column:first_name" json:"first_name"`
	LastName  string `gorm:"column:last_name" json:"last_name"`
	Email     string `gorm:"column:email" json:"email"`
	FullName  string `gorm:"-" json:"full_name"` // calculated from FirstName + LastName
}

func (u *User) AfterFind() error {
	u.FullName = u.FirstName + " " + u.LastName
	return nil
}
